summary: Closed M7-MAP-SITUATION-MODE-UX-001 after PR #205 passed CI, merged to main, and origin/main advanced to 4970eca4676d2eb732231d0268880e7ac1a4817d. This resolves the first M7 UX recovery blocker for the player-facing map: default Situation/?? mode, non-rectangular low-fidelity strategic regions, route de-noising, localized map legend/recommendation presentation, and player-mode debug/grid suppression. It is not formal M7 content-lock acceptance, final cartography, production art, or manual node battle scope.
